source: Environment and Climate Change Canada — MSC GeoMet LTCE

story.description: Squamish Area, BC recorded 34.6 °C. It exceeded the previous record high maximum temperature of 34.5 °C from 1990.

highlights.text: 28 records across 28 communities; 28 were daily snowfall record events.
23 records across 23 communities; 23 were daily snowfall record events.
